metadata.description: A marketplace of AI-powered browser automation workflows for Athena

workflows.name: e2e-test-builder
workflows.description: Build and run Playwright E2E tests — explores the app, plans coverage, writes tests, and fixes flakes

workflows.name: robot-automation
workflows.description: Build and run Robot Framework E2E tests (Browser library) — explores, plans, writes, and fixes flakes

workflows.name: exploratory-testing
workflows.description: Explore an app to surface risks and unknowns, then hand findings to a planning workflow

workflows.name: smoke-testing
workflows.description: Scope the minimum critical-path checks that confirm a build is healthy

workflows.name: regression-testing
workflows.description: Scope rerunnable checks across changed and high-risk areas

workflows.name: web-bench
workflows.description: Run WebBench benchmarks on real-world browser tasks and report timing and token usage

workflows.name: loop-test
workflows.description: Dev-only loop check — agent does a tiny thing each run and stops
